_meta.description: Curated legendary recipe components + per-legendary references. Recipes are intentionally one-level-deep (the curator decides which sub-gifts to expand into leaves vs. leave as 'specific work'). Item IDs sourced from https://wiki.guildwars2.com/ and verified against https://api.guildwars2.com/v2/items?ids=... — items with uncertain IDs are marked in `notes`. Add new legendaries by referencing existing components + adding the precursor + signature high-value ingredients as direct leaves.
_meta.group_field_note: 1.4 adds an optional `group` field on direct leaves. Component leaves are grouped by the component name; unlabelled direct leaves fall into the 'Specific' bucket. A direct-leaf group label must not equal a component name.
_meta.verification_method: GET /v2/items?ids=<csv>&lang=en — compare returned name to the leaf name field
_meta.scope_note: All 32 legendary collections covered. Shared components: gift_of_fortune, gift_of_mastery, mystic_tribute, gen1_signature, vision_crystal. As of 1.2 the vision_crystal component flattens to its raw upstream mats (Bloodstone Dust ×100, Dragonite Ore ×100, Empyreal Fragment ×100, Augur's Stone) since players typically hold the raw form rather than tier-6 intermediates. 1.3 additions: (a) Aurora/Vision/Coalescence now carry the real LWS3/LWS4/raid-PoF map currencies and items (Blood Ruby, Petrified Wood, Kralkatite Ore, Funerary Incense, etc.) as direct leaves, replacing the v1.2 low-fidelity placeholders; (b) Ad Infinitum carries an expanded fractal spend (Pristine Fractal Relics, agony infusions, ecto); (c) the Gen 1 craftable precursors howler and frostfang now carry bulk ascended mat leaves (Deldrimor Steel, Spiritwood Plank, Elonian Leather, ecto); (d) Gen 2 weapons (astralaria, hope, nevermore, chuka_and_champawat) now multiply Vision Crystal needs ×4 by carrying 3 additional Bloodstone Dust/Dragonite/Empyreal/Augur's Stone direct leaves on top of the 1× shared vision_crystal component.

gift_of_fortune.name: Gift of Fortune
gift_of_fortune.description: Required by every Gen 1 legendary weapon. Mystic Forge: Gift of Magic + Gift of Might + 77 Mystic Clovers + 250 Glob of Ectoplasm. The leaves below flatten Gift of Magic/Might into their raw mats since players track those directly.

gift_of_mastery.name: Gift of Mastery
gift_of_mastery.description: Required by every Gen 1 legendary weapon. Mystic Forge: Bloodstone Shard + Gift of Battle + Gift of Exploration + Gift of Maguuma Mastery / Tyrian / etc (varies by gen). Listing only the universal four; the gen-specific mastery gift is curated per-legendary if needed.

leaves.name: Bloodstone Shard
leaves.notes: 200 Spirit Shards from Miyani

leaves.name: Gift of Battle
leaves.notes: WvW reward track

leaves.name: Gift of Exploration
leaves.notes: 100% world completion

mystic_tribute.name: Mystic Tribute (Gen 2)
mystic_tribute.description: Gen 2 / Gen 2.5 equivalent of Gift of Fortune for many recipes. Mystic Forge: 2× Bloodstone Shard + 250 Mystic Coin + 250 Glob of Ectoplasm + 77 Mystic Clovers.

gen1_signature.name: Gen 1 Signature Work
gen1_signature.description: Materials reused across every Gen 1 'Gift of [Weapon Name]' (the Rojan-purchased component) plus the universal Gift of [Element] base. Each Gen 1 'Gift of [Weapon]' takes 100 Icy Runestones; each elemental gift takes 250 Orichalcum Ingots + 250 Bolts of Gossamer + lodestones (lodestones are curated per-legendary as direct leaves since they vary).

vision_crystal.name: Vision Crystal
vision_crystal.description: Per-crystal upstream mats via the Mystic Forge variant: 1 Bloodstone Brick + 1 Dragonite Ingot + 1 Empyreal Star + 1 Augur's Stone. Each tier-6 intermediate is itself refined from 100 raw mats — players typically hold the raw mats rather than the bricks/ingots/stars, so this component flattens to the raw form so 'owned' counts the user's bank stacks directly. Legendaries that need N Vision Crystals (most Gen 2 weapons use 4) multiply these quantities accordingly via additional direct leaves on the per-legendary entry; this shared component contributes 1× (the floor).

legendaries.notes: Gen 1 sword. Gift of Lightning uses 100 Charged Lodestones.
Gen 1 staff. Gift of Rainbows uses Onyx + Charged Lodestones (rainbow elements).
Gen 1 shortbow. Gift of Dreams uses Unicorn Horns + Icy Runestones, no traditional lodestones.
Gen 1 shield. Gift of Prophecies uses Glacial Lodestones.
Gen 1 underwater spear. Gift of Underworld uses Crystal Lodestones.

legendaries.notes: Gen 1 axe. Gift of Ice uses 100 Corrupted + 100 Glacial Lodestones. Tooth of Frostfang precursor is craftable via the Tier 1/2/3 precursor collections — ascended mats listed are an approximation of the bulk weaponsmith spend.

legendaries.notes: Gen 1 warhorn. One of the cheapest Gen 1s — precursor is craftable. Gift of Howl uses Onyx + Glacial Lodestones. Ascended mats listed are an approximation of the bulk huntsman/leatherworker spend across all 3 precursor tiers.
Gen 1 dagger. Gift of Incinerator uses Molten + Destroyer Lodestones.

leaves.name: Mithril Ingot
leaves.notes: Gift of Quaggan uses 250 Mithril Ingots converted to Mercury

legendaries.notes: Gen 1 hammer. Iconic for its liquid-mercury Norn-form transformation; signature mat is mercury (no public id) — Mithril Ingot is the upstream sink.
Gen 1 underwater harpoon gun. Gift of Sharks uses Corrupted Lodestones.
Gen 1 underwater trident. Gift of the Krait uses Corrupted Lodestones.
Gen 1 longbow. Gift of Nature uses Crystal Lodestones.
Gen 1 scepter. Gift of Weather has no lodestones — Hardened Leather + Orichalcum heavy. Already covered by gen1_signature.
Gen 1 focus. Gift of Music uses Charged Lodestones.
Gen 1 mace. Gift of Music/Lights uses no lodestones beyond Icy Runestones already in gen1_signature.
Gen 1 rifle. Gift of the Hunt uses Molten Lodestones.
Gen 1 pistol. Gift of Joking uses Crystal Lodestones (rainbow confetti theme).
Gen 1 torch. Gift of Rodgort uses 100 Molten + 100 Destroyer Lodestones.
Gen 1 greatsword. Gift of Light uses no lodestones — Icy Runestones already in gen1_signature. Combine with Twilight in Mystic Forge to make Eternity (id 30689).
Gen 1 greatsword. Gift of Darkness uses 100 Onyx Lodestones.
